## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter to operations or product quality?

## Risk

- What could regress?
- Which modules or workflows are touched?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint:check`
- [ ] `php artisan test`
- [ ] Manual UI review completed

## Screenshots / Evidence

Add before/after screenshots or a short recording for any visible UX change.

## Notes for Reviewers

List anything that deserves extra attention, tradeoffs taken, or follow-up work not included in this PR.
